segments.text: Hello?

segments.text: Hello, greetings, I am Dr. Meera Bhas calling from Tata AIG Insurance. Can I speak with Suman Yadav ji?

segments.speaker: doctor

segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, so at what time can we call you?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: After 3 PM, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: After 3 PM, okay. We will call you after 3 PM.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I'll call. Should I call on the same number?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: No, you cannot. This is a company-initiated call, so you will receive a call from us. Okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, yes.

segments.text: Hello?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hello?

segments.text: Hello, I am Dr. Meera, calling from Tata AIA Insurance. Can I speak to Suman Yadav ji?

segments.text: Yes, one minute, I will connect.

segments.text: Hello?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Hello, I am Dr. Meera, calling from Tata AIA Insurance. Are you Suman Yadav ji, right?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, yes, yes.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Which language would you prefer to speak in? Would Hindi be suitable for you?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hindi.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: This call is being recorded for quality and audit purposes. As per the process, some verification questions about your insurance and health will be asked. It will take 10 minutes. Is this a suitable time to talk?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Please note that any information and replies you provide on this call will be considered part of your application. Once the proposal is approved, it will become a legal relationship between you and Tata AIA Life Insurance. Any false information or false statement may affect your contract, and your policy may be rejected or a claim may be denied. I request that you answer all questions carefully and correctly.

segments.text: Please state your full name.

segments.text: Suman Yadav.

segments.text: Date of birth.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Education qualification?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: 12th and I have done JBT diploma.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, are you currently employed, do you have your own business, or are you a housewife?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I am doing a job, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Can you tell me the last four digits of your Aadhaar card?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Just one minute, I'll get it.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: I was about to put it on the phone.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: It will be 9375 1642, ma'am. I will just check to confirm.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Yes, yes, yes. Just the last four are needed.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Yes, 1642 is at the end, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, which city are you speaking from?

segments.text: Yes?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Which city are you speaking from? Where are you speaking from?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: From Delhi, Najafgarh, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Delhi, Najafgarh.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Which state are you speaking from? UP, Bihar?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: New Delhi, ma'am. New Delhi.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Delhi? Oh, from Delhi.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Now, 20 questions related to your health and habits will be asked. At the end of the question, you have to answer yes or no. If you don't understand any word, you can ask, and its meaning will be explained to you. It is important to answer all questions. Some questions may seem a little inappropriate to you, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: In the last 24 months, have you used smoking tobacco or any nicotine products?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Oh, ma'am, why would I do that? No.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: We ask this to all customers. We cannot skip it, okay? So this won't be sensitive for you.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yeah.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Has your doctor ever advised you to reduce or stop alcohol?

segments.text: No, ma'am, I...
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: You don't drink alcohol?

segments.text: When I don't drink, where would the advice come from?

segments.text: Okay. Any use of drugs or narcotics not prescribed by a doctor?

segments.text: No.

segments.text: Yes?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Height? What is your height?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: 5 feet.

segments.text: What is your weight?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Weight is not accurate every day, is it?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Your voice was breaking. Can you tell me the weight again? 66?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Have you had any tests, treatments, or taken any medicines for any of the following diseases: high or low blood pressure, high cholesterol, triglycerides, or lipids?

segments.text: No.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Chest pain, heaviness, discomfort, heart attack, any problem in heart vessels or arteries, congenital heart disease, rapid heartbeat, shortness of breath, or any heart-related illness?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Tumors, carcinomas in situ, pre-cancerous conditions, blood cancer, enlarged nodes, any lesions on the skin, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sarcoma, or any lump on the body such as a tumor, polyp, nodule, cyst, or lump related to cancer?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Diabetes, high blood sugar, sugar in urine, hyperthyroid, hypothyroid, other thyroid or endocrine diseases?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Shortness of breath, bronchitis, sinusitis, TB, pneumonia, persistent cough, shortness of breath while sleeping, fluid in lungs, or any lung-related problems?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Hepatitis, hepatitis carrier, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease, or any liver-related illness?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Anemia, abnormal blood formation, systemic lupus erythematosus, or any blood or immune system related problems?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, none.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Any mental illness such as anxiety, depression, fits, paralysis, weakness in legs, stroke, Parkinson's, forgetfulness, Alzheimer's disease?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Excessive acidity in stomach, stomach acid not settling, stomach ulcers, persistent indigestion, gas problem in intestines, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, pancreatitis, or any problem related to pancreas, stomach, or intestines, any digestive problems?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Kidney stone problem, gallstones, pain or burning sensation while passing urine, or blood or protein in urine, chronic kidney disease, kidney failure, piles, fistula, or any kidney, bladder, urinary tract, or urinary system related problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am, nothing.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Persistent back pain, knee pain, gout, slipped disc, muscular dystrophy, deformity, difficulty in walking, or any problem in muscles, bones, joints, hands, feet, or spine?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Light pain. I have knee pain, light pain. I walk and I can walk well and sleep peacefully, but I have a slight pain. I don't take any medicine for it.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Have you shown it to a doctor?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I showed it to them, and they said to get therapy.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Physiotherapy?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, it's fine after therapy, but then if I walk too much, it gets worse that day. Otherwise, there is no problem.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And for how many years have you had this problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: This has been on and off for about a year. There is a slight pain, and after therapy, it gets better. Then it's in the joints, like the knees.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, did the doctor ask you to get X-rays or anything?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: He asked something like that, so he said to get 15 days of therapy.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, okay.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: When was the last time you showed it to a doctor related to this?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: When was the last time you showed it to a doctor related to your knee pain? When did you last tell a doctor about your knee pain? One month ago, two months ago, six months ago?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, it's been about six months, ma'am. After that, I do exercises myself. He said to keep doing regular exercise. There's no cure for this knee pain. Everyone gets it.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Did he tell you it's arthritis or something like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no arthritis. Yes, I don't take any medicines of any kind.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Any blindness in the eye, low vision, cataract, or have you had cataract surgery?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no surgery or anything.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Any hearing loss in the ear, low hearing, difficulty speaking, change in voice, difficulty swallowing food, ear discharge, or any problem related to ear, nose, or throat?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Apart from this, do you have any health information that you think might be necessary during the policy processing?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, I am perfectly fit right now. I don't know about the future.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. In the last five years, ma'am, have you had any disease with abnormal medical findings or any scan like X-ray, ultrasound, MRI, CT, ECG, endoscopy, blood or urine test that was not normal?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, nothing happened, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Have you continuously taken any medication or treatment for more than two weeks, or have you been admitted to a hospital for examination or treatment?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, I don't even remember being admitted. Maybe when my son was born, I might have gone to the hospital then.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Have you ever had any problems with your gait, or have you ever needed bed rest for more than two weeks due to injuries or illness?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Childhood diseases or hereditary diseases such as cerebral palsy, Down syndrome, or polio?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, nothing, ma'am, okay.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: This question is a little sensitive. Have you or your husband had any tests, treatment, or medical advice or counseling for sexually transmitted diseases such as HIV AIDS?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Any sudden weight gain, weight loss, or any symptoms recently for which you are awaiting medical advice, treatment, or surgery?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, nothing, ma'am. Weight is fine.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Did you have your last menstrual period?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, my menopause time is going on. I am 49, so the period doesn't come for four or five months, then it comes and then stops.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: So I asked the doctor, and he said it's menopause time, it happens like that, it comes and goes.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: And how many children do you have, ma'am?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Two, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. During pregnancy, did you have gestational diabetes, pre-eclampsia, or any pregnancy-related complications?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, nothing. My son was born by C-section.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: There were no complications after the C-section, right?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no, no.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: When was the C-section done? In which year?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: It was in 2008, ma'am.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: 2008, okay.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. And did you tell the doctor about your menopause?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I went about four or five months ago, and when I had my period, they said it's menopause time, it happens like that, sometimes it comes, sometimes it doesn't, intermittently.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Did he not ask you to do any tests or scans?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no, nothing. He said it's normal, it will stop, that's how it is during menopause.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, okay.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Apart from this, have you shown your doctor any breast lump, breast disease, irregular painful menstruation, abnormal pap smear, or any breast or gynecological condition?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Do you confirm that all the answers you have given are completely true?

segments.text: Yes, yes, ma'am, absolutely.
